description: Create @product/mcp package (oss stub + ee entry) mirroring @product/chat, with next.config oss/ee aliasing
Move agents.ts / idpToken.ts / agentAudit.ts / adminAuth.ts from server/src/lib/mcp to ee/server/src/lib/mcp
Move jsonRpcServer.ts (remote MCP handler) to ee/server/src/lib/mcp
/api/mcp route shell stays in server/src/app, dynamic-imports the EE handler via @product/mcp; 404 in CE
/api/v1/mcp/{agents,idp-providers,audit} route shells dynamic-import EE impl via the seam; 404 in CE
PRM route (/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource) loads EE impl via the seam; 404 in CE
Move the two agent migrations to ee/server/migrations; verify run-ee-migrations.js applies them without double-applying
Keep CE pieces in place + verify no EE leakage (agent-tooling, connector, meta/mcp-registry, loadRegistry, registry.generated stay CE)
Re-run the live agent E2E after relocation for parity (admin agent reads ticket; no-role 403; untrusted 401; audited)
Production EE build passes (npm run build:ee) with the relocated MCP governance
CE build stubs the EE MCP surface (routes 404 / no EE governance source bundled)
Make the agent subject claim configurable per trusted IdP (sub / azp / client_id)
Real IdP smoke against ONE of Entra/Keycloak/Google: register provider, provision agent, token round-trip, dispatch + audit
Finalize @alga-psa/mcp-connector public name + package.json (publishConfig, files, bin)
Publish the connector to npm so npx @alga-psa/mcp-connector works
Remove dev test artifacts (mcp-test-key API key, mcp-agent-* backing users + agents) from shared envs; document the procedure
Admin setup docs: stand up remote server, register tenant IdP, provision agent + assign roles, export audit
End-user connector setup docs (expand/link the connector README for Claude Desktop + Cursor)
MCP settings area + nav entry in the admin UI, permission-gated to admins
Trusted IdP providers UI: list / add / remove (issuer, jwks_uri, audience, subject-claim)
Agents UI: list / create / deactivate (name, description, IdP issuer+subject)
Agent RBAC role assignment UI (select from existing roles)
Agent audit viewer UI: list, filter by agent, export
Wire the UI to /api/v1/mcp/* (or server actions); enforce admin-only access
Per-tenant PRM (tenant hint via host/path) so authorization_servers are tenant-scoped — OR document the single-tenant-appliance limitation
Expired agent-session-key cleanup sweep (purpose='mcp_agent' keys past expiry)
Audit decision granularity: distinguish allow / deny (403) / error (other) instead of deriving from isError
